word: H4358 - מִכְלֹול - miklôwl - mik-lole' - Most gorgeously

sections.paragraph:
Original: מכלול

Transliteration: miklôl

Phonetic: mik-lole'

BDB Definition:

  1. perfection, gorgeous attire (noun masculine)
  2. perfectly, most gorgeously (adverb)

Origin: from H3634

TWOT entry: 985c

Part(s) of speech:
